text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What happened? Did you have trouble visualizing
it?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: It's all right. Don't look so down about it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
We can come back and play again later. Then I'll
have another excuse to skip practice, so it all
works out for me.
